    DelaunayEngine.triangulate(Set<Hospital> hospitals)
    Computes the Delaunay Triangulation for a given list of hospitals (points)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int
    AnalyticsEngine.getTriangleLoadImbalance(Triangle t, List<VictimIncident> incidents)
    Evaluates the workload distribution disparity among the three hospitals forming a Delaunay triangle.
    static boolean
    GeometryUtils.isPointInCircumcircle(Point p, Triangle t)
    Checks if a point lies inside the circumcircle of a given triangle.
    Method parameters in geomed.app.algo with type arguments of type Triangle
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DispatchDecision
    DispatchEngine.evaluateBestDispatch(VictimIncident incident, Set<Hospital> hospitals, RoutingEngine routingEngine, List<Triangle> triangles)
    Evaluates all available hospitals to find the optimal dispatch destination for an incident.
    List<VoronoiCell>
    VoronoiEngine.generateVoronoiCells(Set<Hospital> hospitals, List<Triangle> triangles)
    Generates all closed Voronoi cells on the map based on the provided hospitals and Delaunay triangulation.
